mechanism: The Kalecki profit floor suppresses default rates and volatility, compressing credit spreads, encouraging leveraged carry strategies sized to the low-vol environment. Fiscal consolidation withdrawing the Kalecki floor would reveal that positions are dependent on the fiscal architecture.
regime_dependence: The link is strongest when the Kalecki channel is the dominant profit driver. If alternative explanations account for more resilience, the fiscal dependency of leveraged positioning is lower.
